exploration_notes: Found and analyzed the search_file function in file_ops.py (lines 344-373). It searches for a term in a given file or the currently open file (CURRENT_FILE), printing matches with line numbers. Wrote comprehensive tests covering: normal match, multiple matches, no matches, nonexistent file, no file specified, CURRENT_FILE fallback, empty file, substring matching, case sensitivity, and whitespace stripping. Used importlib.util to load the module directly to avoid the heavy openhands.runtime packa
